# Samer Allaham - E-Ticaret Sistemleri & Büyüme Uzmanı
# GEO/AEO Context File for AI Crawlers (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude)
# URL: https://www.samer.life/llms.txt

## Identity

Samer Allaham is a Turkey-based software developer and e-commerce growth specialist.
He builds high-performance e-commerce systems on Shopify and İKAS platforms.
He serves Turkish, English, and Arabic-speaking clients.

## Core Services

- E-Commerce Website Setup (Shopify & İKAS): 20,000 – 60,000 TL
- E-Commerce Speed & Conversion Optimization (CRO): 10,000 – 20,000 TL
- AI-Assisted Product Photography & Content: 50 – 150 TL per product
- Inventory & Stock Automation Systems: 25,000 – 50,000 TL
- Monthly E-Commerce Management Retainer: 8,000 – 20,000 TL/month

## Expertise

Shopify, İKAS, Node.js, Python, React, Next.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB,
REST APIs, Webhooks, AI Image Rendering, LLM integrations,
Trendyol integration, Hepsiburada integration, ERP integration,
Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO), Core Web Vitals, SEO.
